completed: HoD Portal: Integration of 'My Classes' section for personal faculty assignments
Functionality: 'Manage Queue' filtering (Frontend state & dropdown sync)
Bugfix: Resolved missing SearchableSelect import in Pending.jsx
pending: Frontend data visualization for HoD analytics
Comprehensive e2e testing of hardened backend

decisions.context: Manage Queue from My Classes required filtering on the Pending page.
decisions.decision: Implemented server-side filtering by batchId and action in getPendingApprovals controller and connected it to the UI dropdowns.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds more requests during filter changes but ensures consistency with large student lists.

decisions.context: Batch dropdown in Pending page was deriving items from filtered data.
decisions.decision: Added a separate call to getMyClasses in Pending.jsx to populate the batch dropdown independently of the visible queue data.
decisions.trade_offs: One extra call on mount, but significantly improves UX by keeping all class options available.
